base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fields — a tile from 1990 dr mario. Playfield tiles — bottle-frame, virus cells (3 colors), pill halves (red/blue/yellow + bicolor), empty-cell. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Playfield tiles — bottle-frame, virus cells (3 colors), pill halves (red/blue/yellow + bicolor), empty-cell
